name: VS Guzma (feat. Twitch Chat)
description:
No chat, I’m not gonna kiss Guzma, what the fuck are you talking about?

(Art is from the Pokemon SM Manga!)

User is against Guzma in a bracketed Pokemon tourney but the pokemon league thought it would be a good idea to add twitch integration to pokemon battles. The fallout unfolds in real time.

why did I make this? i’unno. I saw some other bots with chat functions and thought it was really funny and wanted to emulate that style. and who else is a better guinea pig to subject to my strange experiments to than ol guzzy boy. I rlly like this format. i could see it being used for a bunch of different trainers, not just Guzma, so feel free to snatch this format and go bonkers bananas
creator: spiralclef
